_publications._publicationTitle: Development of a Novel Biomarker Platform for Profiling Key Protein-Protein Interactions to Predict the Efficacy of BH3-Mimetic Drugs.

_contextSnippet: Clones were selected based on specific binding to the pro-survival BCL-2:BIM complex but not monomers of unbound BCL-2, BCL-XL, MCL-1, or BIM...PRIMAB detection of BCL-2:BIM complex on ELISA plates was blocked in a dose-dependent fashion by the BCL-2 selective BH3 mimetic ABT-199/Venetoclax
details: Specific binding to BCL-2:BIM complex but not monomers of unbound BCL-2, BCL-XL, MCL-1, or BIM, with dose-dependent blocking by ABT-199/Venetoclax
